items.title: Custom Metal-Enclosed Switchgear
items.summary: S&C Custom Metal-Enclosed Switchgear — incorporating interrupter switches and power fuses in rugged monocoque enclosures — is tailored to meet your specific distribution system needs.

items.title: IntelliCap® 2000 Automatic Capacitor Controls & Sensors
items.summary: Capacitor controls benefit utilities by reducing unused capacity, regulating voltage, monitoring line conditions, and protecting capacitor banks.

items.title: IntelliRupter® PulseCloser® Fault Interrupter
items.summary: S&C's IntelliRupter® PulseCloser® Fault Interrupter is your all-in-one feeder solution for grid modernization, empowering you to increase segmentation, loop your circuits, and protect underground lines.

items.title: IntelliTeam® CNMS Communication Network Management System
items.summary: IntelliTeam® CNMS Communication Network Management System provides utilities with a comprehensive view of network configuration and performance through a browser-based interface.

items.title: IntelliTeam® FMS Feeder Management System
items.summary: The IntelliTeam® FMS Feeder Management System’s intuitive, user-friendly interface allows you to see the holistic view of your system, work with groups of devices, and analyze a single device.

items.title: IntelliTeam® SG Automatic Restoration System
items.summary: Using peer-to-peer communication with distributed intelligence, the IntelliTeam software tracks system conditions to quickly initiate fault isolation and service restoration on your distribution feeders

items.title: Loadbuster®—The S&C Loadbreak Tool
items.summary: Loadbuster®—The S&C Loadbreak Tool is the original lightweight, easy-to-use portable loadbreak tool for use with disconnects, cutouts, power fuses, and fuse limiters.

items.title: Recloser Bypass Disconnects
items.summary: S&C Recloser Bypass Disconnects are station-type devices used to bypass and isolate automatic circuit reclosers for repair or routine maintenance.

items.title: System VI™ Switchgear
items.summary: For applications through 34.5 kV requiring up to 25 kA symmetrical short-circuit duty, S&C's System VI Switchgear features a modular arrangement of S&C Vista® Underground Distribution Switchgear.

items.title: TripSaver® Reclosers
items.summary: Improve your system’s response to 80% of overhead faults. Avoid outages, save on O&M costs, and enhance resilience and reliability in the most vulnerable area of your grid with S&C’s reclosers.
